calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Jun-10-2008 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for OSC hearing for Change of Name of an Adult and Change of Name of a Minor.
Dept. 218, Commissioner: William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Deborah Neville, CSR 703.

Petitioner Chew-Eng Atina Khanthavong was present in pro per for her own change of name, and also as as Guardian ad litem for the minor Alyssa Jackielu Rico.
Petitioner was placed under oath and examined.
The minor's father, Karl Rico was present in pro per to object to the proposed change of name of the minor. Mr. Rico was placed under oath and examined.
Proof of Publication in file.

Notwithstanding the objections to the proposed change of name of the minor by her father, it appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct and sufficient, and that the petition should be granted.

The Court grants the petition for Change of Name to: Atina Liu.

The Court grants the petition for Change of Name of a Minor to: Alyssa Liu.

Decree Changing Names was submitted to and signed by the Court.
